message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
participant "index.jsp" as index
participant "basket.jsp" as basket
rectangle "Order" as Order
rectangle "Pay" as Pay
rectangle "LogicFacade" as LogicFacade
rectangle "OrderMapper" as OrderMapper
database "Database" as Database

note right of User: We assume user is logged in

User -> index : user clicks "add to cart"
activate index
index -> Order : [for each cupcake] AddToOrder()
activate Order
Order --> index : redirect (msg "added to basket")
deactivate Order
index --> User : display msg
deactivate index

User -> index : user clicks "show basket"
activate index
index -> basket : ShowBasket()
activate basket
basket -> Pay : Pay()
activate Pay
Pay -> Pay : Check date
Pay -> Pay : Check if logged in
Pay -> Pay : Check balance
Pay -> LogicFacade : saveOrder()
activate LogicFacade
LogicFacade -> OrderMapper : saveOrder()
activate OrderMapper
OrderMapper -> Database : saves order
deactivate OrderMapper
OrderMapper --> LogicFacade : return
deactivate LogicFacade
LogicFacade --> Pay : return
deactivate Pay
Pay --> index : redirect (msg "order placed")
deactivate basket
index --> User : display msg
deactivate index

@enduml
```
